title: Add automated regression test for the bot-self-blast bug
summary: Companion regression test for the bot-self-blast bug. Bot AI's danger map should include its own freshly-placed bombs; if it ever stops doing so, this test should catch the regression.
repro: Bot places a bomb; observe that it walks AWAY from the projected blast cells
expected: Playtest .playtest.json under examples/kaboom-crew/playtests/qa-proposed/ asserts the bot is alive 1.5 s after placing a bomb on a corridor cell.
